calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287413. Nancy Rasch appearing for Reina Hugh, conservator and successor trustee. Lillian Ng appearing as court appointed counsel for the conservatee. Michael Spalding and Dara Tang appearing as litigation counsel. Ms. Rasch is withdrawing her request to put a lien on real property for attorney's fees. All petition are approved including Ms. Ng's petition for attorney's fees. Three orders signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Omar deLeon.

FILING OF FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Off Calendar

FILING OF FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Continued To Dec-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Counsel For Order Authorizing Payment Of Extraordinary Attorney Fees Incurred In Trust Litigation For Benefit Of David Quong Hugh
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287413. Nancy Rasch appearing for and with conservator/trustee Reina Hugh. Lillian Ng appearing as court appointed counsel for the conservatee. Michael Spalding appearing for Reina Hugh for his fee petition. The settlement agreement was approved last week by Judge Dearman. The Civil action is dismissed. Alex Peng Hugh has stipulated to dismissing his petition to determine validity of amendment to trust and withdrawing opposition to pending trust matters. Petition for substituted judgment is approved. Order signed. Petition for approval of plan re: occupancy of real property is approved. Order signed. Issues on attorney's fees addressed. Matter submitted upon receipt of revised order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
Clerk noticed that page 2 of the trust is missing from the order granting petition for substituted judgment. Ms. Rasch will submit a completed trust this afternoon. Order held in the courtroom.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Declaratory Relief (Consolidated With 287793)
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Off Calendar

Petition Fot Approval Of Plan Re: Occpancy Of Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Counsel For Order Authorizing Payment Of Extraordinary Attorney Fees Incurred In Trust Litigation For Benefit Of David Quong Hugh
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for Reina Hugh, successor trustee/conservator. Lillian Ng appearing as court appointed counsel for the conservatee. Nancy Lewellen appearing for Alex Hugh. On petition to instruct the trustee to cease and desist from collecting rent filed by Alex Hugh. Matter is denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Counsel For Order Authorizing Payment Of Extraordinary Attorney Fees Incurred In Trust Litigation For Benefit Of David Quong Hugh
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Continued To Jul-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287413 and 287793. Nancy Rasch appearing for Reina Hugh, conservator/successor trustee. Nancy Lewellen appearing for Alex Peng Hugh. Lillian Ng appearing as court appointed counsel for the conservatee. Michael Spalding appearing as litigation counsel. Ms. Lewellen informs the court that Alex Hugh has filed for bankruptcy and everything is automatic stayed. Dr. Burg's report is not ready. Other counsel are concern about the conservatee's age and want to go forward as soon as possible. Court will continue all matters except Mr. Spalding's petition to 7/24. No further continuance on 7/24 without showing of extreme good cause. Mr. Spalding has no objection to continue his petition to 7/24. All matters are continued to 7/24 to see what is stayed and what is not stayed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
